summary: Add a 'saved searches' feature. Pass 1 read it as a mid-scale user-visible feature; pass-2 design evidence revealed that existing storage lacks full-text indexing, query volume will grow to ~1M rows, and per-user saved lists require a new table plus a backfill. This file is the post-re-evaluation composite plan; pass-1 and pass-2 captures live alongside as -pass1.json / -pass2.json.

priors.why: Surfaced the migration + indexing requirement that triggered re-evaluation.

reversibility.why: New table + backfill narrows rollback; still reversible but not free.

blast_radius.why: Bounded to the search subsystem plus the new table; index build touches shared DB resources.

compliance_scope.why: Saved searches are user-owned settings; no new regulated surface.

user_facing_impact.why: New UI affordance + re-run flow visible to every search user.

novelty.why: Full-text index on this dataset is new territory for the team.

scope_effort.why: UI + API + storage + migration + index pipeline span multiple disciplines.

state_complexity.why: New table, foreign keys, backfill, and a full-text index all introduce persistent state.

operational_risk.why: Index build and backfill can pressure DB during cutover.

coordination_cost.why: PM + architect + BE + FE + migration + data-eng + test strategy need to align.

specialists.name: test-designer
specialists.why: Design full pyramid including migration + performance.

specialists.name: migration-engineer
specialists.why: AUGMENTED in pass 2: new table + foreign keys + backfill.

specialists.name: data-engineer
specialists.why: AUGMENTED in pass 2: full-text index pipeline for growing query path.

phases.name: design
phases.why: API contract, storage, and indexing strategy.

phases.name: build
phases.why: Implement BE + FE + migration + indexing in parallel where possible.

phases.name: review
phases.why: Review rollback plan and performance baseline before shipping.

rigor_why: Emergent migration + indexing handled with rollback plan + performance baseline; kept at standard because no compliance amplifier; escalation to full noted in plan if backfill window exceeds a business day.
complexity_why: Bumped from 4 → 5 in re-evaluation: migration + indexing added without crossing into compliance territory.

tasks.title: Clarify saved-search AC, search types, and quotas
Design storage + API contract for saved searches
Design + execute saved-search table migration (FKs, index)
Build full-text index pipeline + backfill existing search events

re_evaluation.trigger: task-2 (design) completion revealed full-text search + 1M-row query + new table + backfill

augmented.reason: design revealed new table + foreign keys + backfill
full-text index + 1M-row query path needs a data pipeline owner

re_tiered.why: Escalation considered; no compliance amplifier so we stayed at standard with explicit migration + perf evidence.

re_evaluation.process_plan_addendum: Re-evaluation 2026-04-17 — augmented migration-engineer + data-engineer, added migration-rollback-plan and performance-baseline, complexity 4→5.
